summary: NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering Legionellosis, Leptospirosis, and Listeriosis cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2019. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2018 and 2019.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering perinatal Hepatitis B infection and acute Hepatitis C (confirmed and probable) cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2019. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals.

CDC age-standardized stroke mortality data for U.S. adults aged 35+ by state/territory and county for 2017-2019 (3-year average). Columns include spatially smoothed county rates, stratification by sex and race/ethnicity, data value type, and geographic coordinates.
